title: On Julia's Picture.
content:
How am I ravish'd! when I do but see
    The painter's art in thy sciography?
    If so, how much more shall I dote thereon
    When once he gives it incarnation?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "On Julia's Picture."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
